name: Detroit Wealth Club
description_short: Detroit Wealth Club is a free credit assistance provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 5.0/5 with 31 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Detroit Wealth Club is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 31 reviews, Detroit Wealth Club has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Detroit area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Detroit Wealth Club specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Detroit offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Detroit Wealth Club provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Detroit Wealth Club should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
